<form method="post" action="/submit">
  <label>
    Email
    <input name="email" type="email" autocomplete="email" required />
  </label>

  <label>
    Password
    <input name="password" type="password" minlength="8" required />
  </label>

  <button type="submit">Sign in</button>
</form>

items.title: System Theme Variables
Fetch + JSON
DOM query + event
Type + function
Narrowing
Virtualenv + run
items.code:
python -m venv .venv
source .venv/bin/activate
python main.py

items.title: Dataclass
Typing + async
items.code:
from typing import Any

async def fetch_json(url: str) -> dict[str, Any]:
    import aiohttp
    async with aiohttp.ClientSession() as s:
        async with s.get(url) as r:
            r.raise_for_status()
            return await r.json()

items.title: Component (TSX)
useEffect pattern
Signal + component (TSX)
SFC (script setup)
items.code:
<script setup lang="ts">
import { ref } from "vue";
const n = ref(0);
</script>

<template>
  <button @click="n++">{{ n }}</button>
</template>
